name: ThreatLens
tagline: AI-powered APK malware analysis for bank fraud detection
friendly_one_liner: Upload a sketchy app, get a verdict in 30 seconds instead of guessing.
built_for: A public sector bank's fraud-ops team, via a national research institute
impact_metrics: 4-agent AI pipeline: Triage → Analyst → Synthesizer → Reporter
Full verdict + PDF report in 15-30 seconds
Matches against 5 known banking-trojan malware families
3 independent risk dimensions scored (permission, impersonation, network)

name: MuleNet
tagline: AI fraud intelligence platform for mule account detection
friendly_one_liner: Catches bank accounts being used to launder fraud money, with receipts.
built_for: Personal project - banking fraud-ops use case
impact_metrics: AUC-ROC 99.1%, Precision 98.7% (5-fold cross-validation)
96.3% detection rate on High/Critical risk accounts
Live scoring API responds in under 50ms
SHAP explainability on every flagged account

name: SiliconSeal
tagline: Counterfeit IC chip detection via computer vision + OCR
friendly_one_liner: Point a camera at a chip, find out if it's fake - built for a national defense hackathon.
built_for: A national defense-sector client - Smart India Hackathon 2025 Finals
impact_metrics: SIH 2025 National Finals - defense-sector use case
3 scanning modes: single, batch (20 images), live camera
Weighted confidence scoring across part number, date code, lot code
Knowledge base of 27+ IC entries, auto-enrichable via Mouser API

name: ConnectHub
tagline: Scalable full-stack social platform, fully async
friendly_one_liner: A Twitter-style social app built to show off proper backend engineering, not AI.
impact_metrics: Fully async from HTTP routes to database queries
JWT auth + Argon2 password hashing
Image pipeline: resize + WebP conversion before S3 upload
Full Pytest suite with mocked S3 and database

name: FitnessAI
tagline: Computer-vision form checker for squats, curls, and shoulder press
friendly_one_liner: A gym trainer in your webcam - tells you when your squat form is bad.
built_for: Personal project - computer vision / pose estimation
impact_metrics: Self-collected video dataset across 3 exercise classes
Live frame-by-frame classification + posture correction tips
Roadmap: LSTM upgrade + LLM-based real-time coaching feedback

name: SBI FinVerse
tagline: Proactive multi-agent banking assistant that reaches out first
friendly_one_liner: A bank AI that messages you before you even know you need a loan.
impact_metrics: 3-stage agent pipeline: rule-based trigger detection → product matching → LLM conversation
Detects 6 life-event types from customer financial data
Full reasoning transparency - 5 human-readable steps per response
